additional_rules.description: GMCC Bank Statement Self Employed — qualify self-employed borrowers using 12 or 24 months personal or business bank statements instead of tax returns. Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes AK).
additional_rules.income_docs: 12 or 24 months personal or business bank statements. No tax returns required.
additional_rules.borrower_type: Self-employed borrowers (business owners, sole proprietors, freelancers).
additional_rules.see_guidelines: Refer to GMCC training materials for current LTV, FICO, and reserve requirements.

general_notes: GMCC Bank Statement Self Employed — Non-QM program for self-employed borrowers.
Qualifies income using 12 or 24 months of personal or business bank statements instead of tax returns.
Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes Alaska).
Purchase, rate/term refi, and cash-out refi. Primary, investment, and second home eligible.
Specific LTV, FICO, reserves, and DTI limits vary by investor — refer to GMCC guidelines.
